title: sorghum nutans subvar. pellitum
intro: Sorghum nutans subvar. pellitum, also known as pellitory, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from sore throats, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Pellitory can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being.
